campaign_briefs.messaging_direction: Focus on hassle-free move-in process and family-friendly features. Emphasize quick approval (24-48 hours), move-in this weekend messaging, and family amenities. Tone: reassuring, empowering, helpful.
local_lifestyle_hooks: 3 minutes from Riverside Park with dog park and playground
Steps from Blue Bottle Coffee and Colorado Boutique District
Direct bus access (Line 7 at your door) to downtown schools

campaign_briefs.messaging_direction: Highlight walkability, proximity to work hubs, and nightlife. Emphasize 10-minute commute to tech district, walkable restaurants/coffee shops, and weekend entertainment. Tone: energetic, aspirational, modern.
local_lifestyle_hooks: 10 minutes to Denver Tech District and downtown offices
Walk to Blue Bottle Coffee (2 min) and Chez Laurent (5 min)
10-minute walk to LoDo nightlife district with bars and restaurants
Metro Station (4 min walk) to downtown, airport, or events

campaign_briefs.messaging_direction: Emphasize value without cheap feeling. Highlight $1,150 rent (vs market $1,300), waived deposit, and premium finishes despite price. Tone: smart, confident, empowering.
local_lifestyle_hooks: Luxury finishes at studio rates ($1,150 vs competitors $1,300+)
Bus pass included (Line 7 direct to downtown)
Dog park and pool available to all residents
